## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, programmatic SEO, and platform updates.](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SchoolAI successfully launched their new platform and held a showcase event with 2,000 attendees](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [GrowthX will explore programmatic SEO opportunities after reviewing the new platform](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [SchoolAI is planning to move off Framer to a custom-built website in the future](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [LLM search visibility and tracking will be a focus area for improving SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

## Topics

### SchoolAI Platform Launch and Showcase Event

  - [New platform is live and accessible for sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Showcase event had 2,000 attendees (10,000 registered)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Transcripts and Q\&A data from the event will be shared for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [Current batch of content staged in Framer](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Graham (content reviewer) slightly behind, but still ahead of publishing needs](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [22 articles in Graham's queue, 5 staged for the week](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Programmatic SEO Strategy

  - [GrowthX team to explore new platform and propose programmatic content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Focus on creating "take-home" content for teachers (e.g., checklists, infographics)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Discussion on review process for programmatic content to balance quality and scale](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

### Website Platform Considerations

  - [SchoolAI planning to move off Framer in the future](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Currently capped on CMS collections in Framer](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Exploring options to optimize existing collections and make space for new content](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

### SEO Performance and Optimization

  - [GrowthX to analyze current content performance (impressions vs. clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Will provide suggestions for meta title and description improvements](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Developing strategy to increase LLM citations and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

### Lead Tracking and CTAs

  - [Future need to implement better lead tracking in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Discuss potential UX improvements for CTAs and highlighting free tier](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Consider different CTAs for various page types and target audiences (e.g., teachers vs. admins)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nikki to send showcase transcripts, Q\&A data, and news articles to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore new SchoolAI platform and develop programmatic SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Megan to perform analysis on current content performance and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Jenn to send next week's content topics to Nikki](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Explore options for implementing dynamic CTAs based on target audience](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue providing async updates during Nikki's week off](https://fathom.video/share/ZkPtpqJ44zTTZci1xUi2dPyGR2Tt7uVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

action_items.description: Send showcase transcript and raw Q&A data to Jenn
Send list of next week's content topics to Nikki
Explore new SchoolAI platform, sign up for demo
Analyze existing content for high impressions/low clicks, improve meta titles/descriptions
Develop list of 100 LLM prompts to track SchoolAI mentions
